import { Mountain, ArrowRight, MapPin, Star, Clock, Users, Shield, Coffee, UserPlus, LogIn } from "lucide-react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; const LandingPage = () => { // Sample trail data for landing page const popularTrails = [ { id: 1, name: "Annapurna Base Camp Trek", location: "Pokhara, Nepal", difficulty: "Moderate", duration: "10-14 days", rating: 4.8, price: "$899", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551632811-561732d1e306?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80", featured: true }, { id: 2, name: "Everest Base Camp", location: "Sagarmatha Zone", difficulty: "Challenging", duration: "12-16 days", rating: 4.9, price: "$1299", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1513415564515-763d91423bdd?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80" }, { id: 3, name: "Langtang Valley", location: "Langtang Region", difficulty: "Easy-Moderate", duration: "7-10 days", rating: 4.6, price: "$699", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80" } ]; const features = [ { icon: , title: "Discover Hidden Trails", description: "Explore off-the-beaten-path destinations only locals know about" }, { icon: , title: "Local Guides & Hosts", description: "Connect with certified local guides and authentic homestays" }, { icon: , title: "Safe & Verified", description: "All guides and hosts are verified with proper credentials" }, { icon: , title: "Cultural Experiences", description: "Immerse in authentic Nepali culture and traditions" } ]; const stats = [ { value: "500+", label: "Hidden Trails" }, { value: "200+", label: "Local Guides" }, { value: "10K+", label: "Happy Travelers" }, { value: "50+", label: "Destinations" } ]; return (
